content: The 2024-2025 SOTA improvements in active learning agent memory can be adapted to design a gradient-gated episodic memory bank that prioritizes retaining only high-uncertainty past trajectories for episodic planning, eliminating redundant planning computation while boosting out-of-distribution generalization. This framework reframes episodic planning's memory storage problem as an active learning sample selection task rather than a pure architecture optimization problem.
source_topics: neural architecture memory episodic planning agent
